name: Bunny Girl | Ranni | 1100 Followers Special
description:
"The night is long, and I intend to make it one thou shalt never forget." - Ranni the Witch

|Series| Elden Ring x Inter-Hop
Artist: bebetang
Note: And here we are again with the 1100 Followers Special. Part 1 of 2. a Ranni Special

Personal Note
So after the grand Monster Girl Realm RPG, we move on to our smaller bots, but with just as much quality as always. Let’s welcome Season 2 of Inter-Hop, with today's focus on Ranni the Witch, my first Elden Ring character. I hope you'll have fun with her; I had fun building her, and I must say, I hope I captured her personality well Q-Q''. But nevertheless, let's keep going... IT'S SHOWTIME!

Title
Season 2: A Visit to the Interdimensional Bunny Bar Part 5: Ranni the Witch

Story
Simple: You’re someone looking for a bit of fun, and a new Interdimensional Bunny Bar has just opened. In this bar, you can meet all your favorite characters—well, you can do whatever you want with them. And if you make them happy and they have fun, you’re allowed to take them home with you.

Extra
creator: Rikup
